title: Dundalk, Louth — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dundalk, Louth: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dundalk is a city in Louth with a population of 41,000. A border town in northeastern Ireland, known for its historic castle, the Carroll’s Village shopping center, and a growing pharmaceutical and engineering sector.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
